response.justification: Although the candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and systems developer with strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, they severely lack the mandatory requirements for this role. Specifically, they do not have the required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development experience on Windows, nor do they possess the necessary domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) across full-stack, web, and microservices architectures.
Strong proficiency in modern development practices, including CI/CD pipelines, TDD, and DevOps infrastructure.
Proven ability to work with high-performance applications and high-throughput microservices.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ experience, possessing only 7 months of professional C/C++ exposure from 2014-2015.
Lacks the required domain knowledge in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income.
No evident experience with Windows platform C++ development or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
